query:
SELECT cs.id, cs.shotNumber, cs.videoUrl, cs.videoPrompt, c.id as campaignId, c.title, c.brief, c.genre
FROM campaign_shots cs
JOIN campaigns c ON cs.campaignId = c.id
WHERE cs.videoUrl IS NOT NULL
  AND (
    LOWER(cs.videoPrompt) LIKE '%fog%'
    OR LOWER(c.title) LIKE '%fog%'
    OR LOWER(c.brief) LIKE '%fog%'
    OR LOWER(cs.videoUrl) LIKE '%fog%'
  )
ORDER BY c.id, cs.shotNumber;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2NoQxNASu25QqFj.3c7bc1be8a03 --database WKX2kfVZUM23yKDCoTqGRN --execute 
SELECT cs.id, cs.shotNumber, cs.videoUrl, cs.videoPrompt, c.id as campaignId, c.title, c.brief, c.genre
FROM campaign_shots cs
JOIN campaigns c ON cs.campaignId = c.id
WHERE cs.videoUrl IS NOT NULL
  AND (
    LOWER(cs.videoPrompt) LIKE '%fog%'
    OR LOWER(c.title) LIKE '%fog%'
    OR LOWER(c.brief) LIKE '%fog%'
    OR LOWER(cs.videoUrl) LIKE '%fog%'
  )
ORDER BY c.id, cs.shotNumber;

rows.videoPrompt: Extreme close-up on LeSan's eye, reflecting a kaleidoscopic pattern of deep magenta and electric violet neon lights. A single tear, shimmering with chrome silver, slowly forms at the corner.. extreme close-up, Slow, almost imperceptible zoom with subtle lens breathing, handheld drift adding organic instability.. Hard neon practicals casting mixed 3200K warm and 6500K cool light, creating intense color mixing directly onto the eye.. UV-reactive fog subtly hazing the background, prismatic lens flare streaks across the pupil..  color palette, . analog VHS scan lines, phosphor dot matrix, CRT barrel distortion. heavy 35mm grain + digital compression artifacts. chromatic aberration bleeds at frame edges, VHS scan lines overlay, phosphor glow, neon magenta and electric violet light sources. cinematic, photorealistic, 4K, professional music video production
rows.title: Sonic Insurrection
rows.brief: 1960s hippy culture meets 2030s digital revolution. This is about forging a new future free of corporate control and digital enslavement. Building a new future from the rubble of the past, recombining new with old and building something new and hopeful.

rows.videoPrompt: Wide shot through a prism lens, splitting LeSan's figure into rainbow fragments. They stand amidst glowing, retro-futuristic electronic components, gently touching a circuit board that pulses with neon cyan light.. wide shot, Handheld drift, a subtle sway mimicking a dream state, then a whip pan on a beat to reveal more of the environment.. Neon magenta and electric violet light sources illuminate the scene from multiple angles, creating strong shadows and highlights. No fill light.. Heavy 35mm grain and digital compression artifacts overlay the scene. UV fog scatter diffuses the light, enhancing the prismatic effect..  color palette, . analog VHS scan lines, phosphor dot matrix, CRT barrel distortion. heavy 35mm grain + digital compression artifacts. chromatic aberration bleeds at frame edges, VHS scan lines overlay, phosphor glow, neon magenta and electric violet light sources. cinematic, photorealistic, 4K, professional music video production
rows.title: Sonic Insurrection
rows.brief: 1960s hippy culture meets 2030s digital revolution. This is about forging a new future free of corporate control and digital enslavement. Building a new future from the rubble of the past, recombining new with old and building something new and hopeful.

rows.videoPrompt: Macro shot of LeSan's fingers gently plucking glowing instrument strings (or interacting with glowing electronic components). The strings/components pulse with acid green and neon cyan light.. macro shot, Slow zoom with lens breathing, focusing intensely on the interaction, then a subtle handheld drift away.. Focused hard neon practicals, primarily acid green and neon cyan, highlight the strings/components and LeSan's fingers. No fill.. Heavy 35mm grain and digital compression artifacts. UV fog scatter around the glowing elements. Oversaturated grade, color bleed between channels..  color palette, . analog VHS scan lines, phosphor dot matrix, CRT barrel distortion. heavy 35mm grain + digital compression artifacts. chromatic aberration bleeds at frame edges, VHS scan lines overlay, phosphor glow, neon magenta and electric violet light sources. cinematic, photorealistic, 4K, professional music video production
rows.title: Sonic Insurrection
rows.brief: 1960s hippy culture meets 2030s digital revolution. This is about forging a new future free of corporate control and digital enslavement. Building a new future from the rubble of the past, recombining new with old and building something new and hopeful.

rows.videoPrompt: LeSan's eye, with neon magenta and electric violet reflections dancing within the iris. A single tear, illuminated by a hot coral light, slowly forms. Chromatic aberration bleeds at frame edges.. extreme close-up, Slow 100mm macro zoom, with subtle lens breathing, drifting slightly handheld.. Hard neon practicals, 6500K cool neon from left, 3200K warm magenta from right, no fill.. UV fog scatter, prismatic lens flare catching the tear, heavy 35mm grain..  color palette, . analog VHS scan lines, phosphor dot matrix, CRT barrel distortion. heavy 35mm grain + digital compression artifacts. chromatic aberration bleeds at frame edges, VHS scan lines overlay, phosphor glow, neon magenta and electric violet light sources. cinematic, photorealistic, 4K, professional music video production
rows.title: Sonic Insurrection 2
rows.brief: generate a sense of emerging community, solar punk aesthetic, mood is emergence from darkeness

Overhead hard neon practicals creating geometric patterns, mixed 3200K/6500K color temperature.. rows.videoPrompt: LeSan's lips, forming a soft, hopeful smile. Neon magenta and electric violet light catches the contours. Text 'LeSan.com' appears with a subtle phosphor glow. rows.videoPrompt: Extreme close-up on young man singing into a metal retro style microphone, the microphone reflecting a swirling pattern of neon magenta and electric violet light.  handheld drift subtly shifts focus to pull wide .. Hard neon practicals from off-frame, mixed 3200K warm and 6500K cool, creating dynamic reflections.. UV fog scatter visible in the reflections, subtle prismatic lens flare across the cavernous room..  color palette, . analog VHS scan lines, phosphor dot matrix, moss and forest greens, CRT barrel distortion. heavy 35mm grain + digital compression artifacts. chromatic aberration bleeds at frame edges, VHS scan lines overlay, phosphor glow, neon magenta and electric violet light sources. cinematic, photorealistic, 4K, professional music video production
rows.title: Sonic Insurrection 3
rows.brief: forging a new future free of corporate control and digital enslavement out from the rubble of the past, recombining new with old. A campaign of reunification, building community with a joyful vibe.

rows.videoPrompt: Macro shot of abandoned 1980s style computer room reclaimed by nature, moss and vines growing over everything. A lone metal retro style microphone stands in the center which has tiny, glowing neon cyan moss growing on it. The microphone vibrates with a subtle VHS color bleed.. macro shot, Slow zoom with lens breathing, following the vibration of the microphone stand upward. Handheld drift gives a sense of organic movement.. Focused hard neon practicals highlighting the moss and string, casting long, colored shadows. No fill light.. Heavy 35mm grain and digital compression artifacts overlay the texture. UV-reactive fog subtly obscures the background..  color palette, moss, analog VHS scan lines, phosphor dot matrix, CRT barrel distortion. heavy 35mm grain + digital compression artifacts. chromatic aberration bleeds at frame edges, VHS scan lines overlay, phosphor glow, neon magenta and electric violet light sources. cinematic, photorealistic, 4K, professional music video production

rows.videoPrompt: Double exposure of LeSan's profile, head tilted slightly toward the microphone, expression of release on his face dissolving into swirling cosmos of deep magenta and electric violet. His dark shaggy hair blends with nebulae, creating a sense of cosmic connection.. double exposure, Static, but the double exposure elements shift subtly, creating internal motion.. Mixed color temperature, 3200K warm on LeSan's face, 6500K cool neon in the cosmos. Neon magenta and electric violet light sources define the cosmic elements.. Double exposure, performer dissolves into cosmos. Oversaturated grade, chromatic aberration on edges. UV fog scatter within the cosmic layers..  color palette, . analog VHS scan lines, phosphor dot matrix, CRT barrel distortion. heavy 35mm grain + digital compression artifacts. chromatic aberration bleeds at frame edges, VHS scan lines overlay, phosphor glow, neon magenta and electric violet light sources. cinematic, photorealistic, 4K, professional music video production
